checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.codDescription: Pay with cash when your order is delivered.
checkout.stripeDescription: Pay securely online with card via Stripe.
checkout.addAddressFirst: Please add a delivery address first.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

help.title: Help center
help.subtitle: Answers to common questions about shopping, checkout, orders, and your account.

checkout.a: Add items to your cart, sign in, then choose Cash on Delivery or Stripe card payment. Prices are recalculated on the server — your cart stores product IDs only.

shipping.a: Orders over $75 qualify for free shipping by default. Store-specific thresholds may apply and are shown at checkout.

returns.a: Eligible items can be returned within 7 days of delivery. Contact the store support email listed on your order confirmation for return instructions.

filters.q: Do catalog filters sync to the URL?
filters.a: Yes — category, price, rating, sort, and search all sync to the address bar so you can bookmark or share filtered views.

stillNeedHelp.title: Still need help?
stillNeedHelp.body: Our demo support team responds within one business day for order and account questions.

about.title: About CartPulse
about.subtitle: A multi-store marketplace demo built to showcase modern e-commerce UX and architecture.
about.intro: CartPulse connects shoppers with verified sellers across electronics, fashion, home appliances, and more. Browse with powerful filters, save a persistent cart, and check out with COD or Stripe.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Demonstrate production-grade patterns — server-validated checkout, role-based dashboards, inventory sync, and bilingual storefront — in a single cohesive Next.js application.

marketplace.title: Multi-store catalog
marketplace.body: Products from independent stores with unified search and checkout

secure.title: Trust & security
secure.body: Auth-protected checkout, API rate limits, and server-side pricing

dashboard.title: Role-based experience
dashboard.body: Customer My Account and admin back-office in one platform

stack.title: Built with
stack.body: Next.js 16, React 19, Prisma 7, PostgreSQL, Redux, NextAuth, Stripe, Tailwind CSS v4, and next-intl for English and Bengali.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions about an order, your account, or this demo marketplace? We're here to help.

reachUs.title: Get in touch
reachUs.body: For this demo environment, use the channels below. In production, these would route to your support desk.

orders.title: Order support
orders.body: Signed-in customers can view order details and download PDF invoices from My Account → Orders. Include your order ID when emailing support for faster help.

terms.title: Terms & conditions
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms before using the CartPulse demo marketplace.
terms.lastUpdated: Last updated: July 2026 · Demo terms for evaluation purposes.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: By accessing CartPulse you agree to these terms. This is a demonstration marketplace; products and transactions are simulated for UX and technical evaluation.

accounts.title: 2. Accounts
accounts.body: You must provide accurate information when registering. You are responsible for activity under your account credentials. Admins and super admins are seeded for demo access only.

orders.title: 3. Orders & fulfillment
orders.body: Order confirmation does not guarantee availability until stock is validated at checkout. Order status updates (paid, shipped, delivered) are managed through the admin panel in this demo.

payments.title: 4. Payments
payments.body: Stripe test mode and Cash on Delivery are supported. Do not use real payment credentials in this demo environment. All card flows use Stripe test keys when configured.

returns.title: 5. Returns & refunds
returns.body: Eligible items may be returned within 7 days per demo policy. Refund processing depends on payment method and is handled manually in this demonstration.

liability.title: 6. Limitation of liability
liability.body: CartPulse is provided as-is for demonstration. We make no warranties about merchant listings, pricing accuracy in seed data, or fitness for production use without further hardening.
